about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Your trusted tech partner in Europe
about.text: We are a dedicated team of tech enthusiasts supplying premium hardware to customers across Germany and the United Kingdom. Every product is carefully selected, tested, and shipped with care.

shipping.title: Shipping & Payment
shipping.methods: We accept Stripe, PayPal, and bank transfer.

contacts.title: Contact Us

items.a: Yes, we deliver to all UK addresses within 3–5 business days.
